echo_jobs.input.reason: YUK-166 surfaced: the echo job ROW is enqueued from the golden-E2E test harness (no src/ INSERT of echo_jobs); the echo handler only UPDATEs output/status, never input. The old file-level lint falsely counted input as written because the handler's writeJobEvent payload `{ input, output }` shares the column name across tables — exactly the cross-table masking YUK-166 fixes. No src/ write path exists for echo_jobs.input. | staggered 2026-07-07 (redline-audit P6): orig expected_by 2026-07-31 — grouped by milestone-ref to break the 49-entry same-day cliff.

resolves_when.ref: Sub 0c echo enqueue path moved into src/ OR field dropped

Their write paths land in Lane B (Zod schemas in src/core/schema/event/**) and main-lane Step 4-6 (server read-path rewrite + /api/events + edges CRUD). Lane A only declares schema; write paths must follow.

_comment_b1_w1_soft_track: B1-W1 (ADR-0035) soft-track columns. n=1 (single learner) makes the cohort-structured IRT/CDM/KT parameters STRUCTURALLY non-estimable — this is a ceiling of the single-learner regime (Stocking 1990 / B1 foundation §6.3), NOT a 'write path not built yet' gap. They NEVER feed p(L)/scheduling (ADR-0035 决定 #4). kind:'manual' because the Wave 2 phase is not yet named in docs/superpowers/status.md (a kind:'phase' entry would fail the phase-match check). NOTE (YUK-348): item_calibration.kt_json is NO LONGER allowlisted — it now has an UPDATE write path via src/server/mastery/kt-calibration.ts applyKtEstimate (BKT forward sink, prior-echo at n=1), so audit:schema sees it as update-only (non-stub). It remains a PURE PERSISTENCE SINK with ZERO downstream consumer — having a write path does NOT soften 决定 #4. The other 5 columns (irt_a/irt_c/cdm_json + the 2 mastery_state columns) stay NULL + allowlisted.

item_calibration.irt_a.reason: 软轨区分度：n=1 无 cohort 结构性不可估（Stocking 1990）。慢热 firm-up 有天花板，置信上限受 n=1 约束、非纯时间问题（B1 foundation §6.3）

resolves_when.ref: B1 Wave2 软轨估计器接通

item_calibration.irt_c.reason: 软轨猜测下限：同 irt_a，n=1 结构性不可估

resolves_when.ref: B1 Wave2 软轨估计器接通

item_calibration.cdm_json.reason: 软轨 CDM slip/guess 画像：CDM 估计器 n=1 原样回吐先验，钉软轨不进 p(L)/调度（ADR-0035）

resolves_when.ref: B1 Wave2 软轨估计器接通

mastery_state.calibration_residual.reason: fixed-anchor 慢热残差：Wave2 复盘/锚校准路径才写。残差精度继承锚质量，n=1 受结构性约束（B1 foundation）

resolves_when.ref: B1 Wave2 fixed-anchor 残差路径

mastery_state.fluency_illusion_flag.reason: 流畅度幻觉旗：A2 复盘判定才置位（Wave2）。本 wave 无复盘触发路径

resolves_when.ref: B1 Wave2 A2 复盘判定

mastery_state.theta_grid_json.reason: A4 (YUK-436) 离散网格贝叶斯 θ_KC offset 后验 — inc-1 是 PURE-ADDITIVE SHADOW：写路径已存在（THETA_GRID_ENABLED=true 且单 KC 题时由 updateThetaForAttempt 尾部 shadow-write）。inc-2 读侧已接线（candidate-signals.ts → klpScoreFromGrid 选题），但**仍 flag-gated dark-ship**（THETA_GRID_ENABLED 默认 false → 选题永不读它，theta_hat 仍是 SoT，选题评分逐位等同今天）。故**尚无 LIVE reader**——真正的 grid→SoT cut-over = 校准验证（audit:calibration verdict）后翻 THETA_GRID_ENABLED，那时本 entry 解除。写侧 + 读侧（flag-OFF byte-identical + flag-ON klp_grid）双向均有单测守（state.db.test.ts + candidate-signals.db.test.ts）。

resolves_when.ref: A4 inc-2 grid→SoT cut-over (YUK-436)

subject_trait_journal.change_seq.reason: 两本 journal 的公共全序坐标由 DB 端 DEFAULT nextval('subject_change_seq') 写入（drizzle .default(sql`nextval(...)`)，migration 0064）——审计只扫代码侧 INSERT/UPDATE 写点，看不见 DB default。非 stub：每次 journal insert 都实写；restore 尾另有 setval 补号（archive.ts）。

resolves_when.ref: audit-schema-writes 支持识别 DB-default 写路径（或 YUK-601 写面落显式 nextval 取值）

subject_control_journal.change_seq.reason: 两本 journal 的公共全序坐标由 DB 端 DEFAULT nextval('subject_change_seq') 写入（drizzle .default(sql`nextval(...)`)，migration 0064）——审计只扫代码侧 INSERT/UPDATE 写点，看不见 DB default。非 stub：每次 journal insert 都实写；restore 尾另有 setval 补号（archive.ts）。

resolves_when.ref: audit-schema-writes 支持识别 DB-default 写路径（或 YUK-601 写面落显式 nextval 取值）

subject_trait_journal.source_trait_id.reason: journal 血统/回滚字段（v3 合同 §3.2/§3.3）：唯一写者 = YUK-601 的 fork/fork-and-edit 写面（journal rev-0 'fork_source' 行）。本单（YUK-599 地基）只建表 + 读侧（hydrate 降级链），写面按判词 C 排在 602 之后落。

resolves_when.ref: YUK-601 fork 端点落地（source_trait_id 随 fork_source 行实写）

subject_trait_journal.source_revision.reason: journal 血统/回滚字段（v3 合同 §3.2/§3.3）：唯一写者 = YUK-601 的 fork/fork-and-edit 写面（journal rev-0 'fork_source' 行）。本单（YUK-599 地基）只建表 + 读侧（hydrate 降级链），写面按判词 C 排在 602 之后落。

resolves_when.ref: YUK-601 fork 端点落地（source_revision 随 fork_source 行实写）

subject_trait_journal.rolled_back_from.reason: journal 血统/回滚字段（v3 合同 §3.2/§3.3）：唯一写者 = YUK-601 的 rollback-forward 写面（action='rollback' 行）。本单（YUK-599 地基）只建表 + 读侧（hydrate 降级链），写面按判词 C 排在 602 之后落。

resolves_when.ref: YUK-601 rollback 端点落地（rolled_back_from 随 rollback 行实写）

hub_sync_reconciliation.artifact_id.reason: YUK-384 durable hub-sync reconciliation cursor. Topology columns (generation/status/last_dirty_at/next_attempt_at/actor_ref/artifact_id) are written by the PostgreSQL mark_hub_sync_dirty trigger + live-hub backfill in drizzle/0071 — audit:schema is TS-only and cannot see SQL trigger writes. The claim/lease/finalize/retry columns receive their TypeScript write paths in YUK-384 Tasks 3-8 (src/capabilities/notes/server/hub-sync-reconciliation.ts).

resolves_when.ref: YUK-384 hub-sync-reconciliation.ts claim/finalize/retry write paths (Tasks 3-8) + audit:hub-sync-writers ownership guard (Task 9)
